headline: V33: Enterprise context harness with strict skill, index, and docs gates
highlights: Index-first routing: build and validate `.agents/index/` before broad docs/code reads so models use architecture, docs, code, and skills maps instead of scanning blindly.
Skill contract standardization: every local skill now exposes Required Reads, Operating Rules, Output Expectations, and a compact references file.
Skill release gate: validate_skill_contracts.py blocks missing references, missing required sections, and stale skill discoverability.
Slash-command contract enforcement: README, USAGE_GUIDE, SLASH_COMMAND_REGISTRY, workflows, and scripts are validated together by validate_command_surface.py.

Development docs anti-template gate: validate_development_docs.py and validate_docs_substance.py reject empty fields, placeholder IDs, `src/example.*`, copied template instructions, TBD, and pending output.
/refactor-planning hardening: readiness, toolchain, output, docs, and index gates now fail closed before risky brownfield refactors.
Required docs gates: run_required_docs_gates.py is the common closeout wrapper for planning, execution, verification, reconciliation, and refactor workflows.
OTA onboarding: install/update flows print this V33 brief so new and updated projects learn the mandatory index, skill, and docs gates immediately.
post_update_steps: Run /init_brain after /update_brain to reload rules, MCP registration, skill routing, and the V33 command surface.
Run `python3 .agents/scripts/validate_context_index.py --root .` after building the context index.
Run `python3 .agents/scripts/validate_skill_contracts.py --root .` after installing/updating skills or changing SKILLS_INDEX.md.
Run `python3 .agents/scripts/validate_command_surface.py --root .` after merging/updating `.agents` to confirm command contracts stayed aligned.
Run `python3 .agents/scripts/validate_docs_substance.py --root . --include-development` before closing generated docs work.
Run `python3 .agents/scripts/run_required_docs_gates.py --root . --mode auto` as the non-optional docs closeout wrapper.
Run `cd .agents && ./setup_git_hooks.sh` to install pre-commit/pre-push enforcement for docs/workflow/script changes.
Use /doc_reconcile before changing behavior on brownfield projects with missing, stale, shallow, or template-only docs.
If using /refactor-planning, ensure ESLint is available (global or local node_modules/.bin) so the toolchain gate passes before runtime-heavy steps.
onboarding_prompts: Start by running the V33 index gates: `build_context_index.py --root .` then `validate_context_index.py --root .`.
Review `SLASH_COMMAND_REGISTRY.md` to see the canonical command-to-script mapping for this V33 surface.
Try `/marcus.routecheck` after workflow or skill changes; it now replays routing and skill-contract validators.
Treat generated `/docs/development` files as invalid drafts until both development-docs and docs-substance gates pass.
Use `/doc_reconcile` before `/develop`, `/quick_fix`, or `/refactor-planning` when brownfield docs are missing or weak.
Read `V33.0_RELEASE_NOTES.md` for the full enterprise context harness and strict gate rollout.
